summary: Iteration 12 Testing Complete - BIQC Calibration Write Unification Verified. All 27 backend tests passed. All calibration completion paths now write to user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/calibration/brain completion block (lines 3197-3214) writes persona_calibration_status='complete' to user_operator_profile
VERIFIED: POST /api/calibration/answer Q9 completion (lines 2980-2997) writes persona_calibration_status='complete' to user_operator_profile
VERIFIED: POST /api/calibration/answer fallback completion (lines 3016-3031) also writes to user_operator_profile when strategy scaffolding fails
VERIFIED: POST /api/calibration/defer (lines 2500-2514) writes persona_calibration_status='deferred' to user_operator_profile
VERIFIED: POST /api/calibration/init (lines 2586-2618) does NOT reference calibration_status column - only creates shell business_profile
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/backfill-calibration (lines 8402-8460) exists and writes to user_operator_profile
VERIFIED: GET /api/calibration/status (lines 2462-2486) reads ONLY from user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status - NO business_profiles fallback
VERIFIED: GET /api/auth/check-profile (lines 2415-2459) reads ONLY from user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status - NO business_profiles fallback
VERIFIED: All calibration endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests
NOTE: SECONDARY writes to business_profiles.calibration_status are still present (lines 2999-3007, 3216-3225, 2516-2538) for backward compatibility, but will silently fail since column doesn't exist
context_for_next_testing_agent: BIQC calibration write unification verified. All three calibration completion paths (calibration/brain, calibration/answer Q9, calibration/answer fallback) now write to user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status='complete'. The calibration/defer path writes 'deferred' to user_operator_profile. GET endpoints (calibration/status, auth/check-profile) read ONLY from user_operator_profile with no business_profiles fallback. business_profiles.calibration_status column does NOT exist, so secondary writes will silently fail (acceptable).

features_verified.calibration_answer_fallback_write_path: COMPLETE - writes to user_operator_profile when strategy scaffolding fails
features_verified.calibration_init_clean: COMPLETE - does NOT reference calibration_status column
features_verified.admin_backfill_endpoint: COMPLETE - exists and writes to user_operator_profile
features_verified.auth_enforcement: COMPLETE - all endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated

code_structure_notes.primary_authority: user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status is the SOLE authority for calibration status
code_structure_notes.secondary_writes: business_profiles.calibration_status writes are kept for backward compatibility but will silently fail (column doesn't exist)
code_structure_notes.upsert_pattern: All write paths handle both UPDATE (existing row) and INSERT (new row) cases
